rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 20, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF T.LES.S.C.'s Plaintiff'S Motion For Reconsideration DENIED. rulings.Case Title: ROBERT PRIMUS VS. ALISSA THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Injunctive And Or Other Equitable Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 20, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF ROBERT PRIMUS' Motion For Injunctive And Or Other Equitable Relief DENIED. The relief requested is not supported by authority or facts of this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Subpoena For Private Financial And Tax Records; For Protective Order; And For Monetary Discovery Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorney Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 20, 2017, line 3. Motion To Quash Subpoena For Private Financial And Tax Records; For Protective Order; And For Monetary Discovery Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorney Of Record moot as the Subpoenas have been withdrawn. Sanctions against Plaintiff's counsel granted in the amount of $4,725 to be paid within 30 days of the date of the order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RANDY T. HOM VS. METROPOLITAN BANK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 20, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address why Marc Applbaum and Kettner Law Corporation should not be ordered to show cause why sanctions should not be imposed for failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's March 20, 2017 minute order. Demurrer is sustained with 10-day leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. All amendments in the Second Amended Complaint shall be underlined and bold. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 20, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG's re-noticed MOTION FOR LEAVE To Amend Complaint GRANTED, no opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith in accordance with the Code of Civil Procedure. = (501/REQ)
